name: concept
description: Flat ValueSet membership: one row per (valueset_url, system, code) from expansion.contains. Serves every measure's terminology JOIN via the public `concepts` wrapper view. MANUALLY MATERIALIZED: Aidbox stores ValueSet resources only in the far registry (far.valueset) — the SoF engine sees zero stored ValueSets ($run verified 2026-07-17), so $materialize cannot populate this view yet. Until native materialization of canonical resources ships, load_measure.py/refresh_sof.py implement the equivalent flatten from far.valueset (with DISTINCT + unique index on (valueset_url, system, code) to collapse duplicate package versions — semantics the native implementation must decide on).
